channel.title: Krea AI
channel.description: Krea AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: What Is Seedance 2.5 and What Can It Do
item.description: Everything new in Seedance 2.5: how it compares to Seedance 2.0, what changed with references and region editing, example prompts, and how to use it on Krea.

item.title: Seedream 5.0 Pro on Krea for Product Photography: 15 Pro
item.description: Seedream 5.0 Pro on Krea for product photography: 15 pro-level examples showing precise material, color, and label edits for approval.

item.title: Seedream 5.0 Pro on Krea: 12 Complex Infographic Reasoning Examples (2026)
item.description: Seedream 5.0 Pro on Krea: 12 complex infographic reasoning examples (2026) showing how to plan hierarchy, label accuracy, and targeted edits.
